label_verbatim: (Name of Foreign Limited Liability Partnership)
rationale: Foreign LLP's name in its home jurisdiction. Per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention foreign filings use entity.home_jurisdiction_name (not entity.name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ('X' one box only.) This application is for a [ ] new
rationale: Unnamed checkbox widget at rect [289.1,434.9,301.0,448.3] — left checkbox of FIRST recital. Selected → enum value 'new'. Filler must bind by rect since the AcroForm field-id is empty.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ('X' one box only.) ... OR [ ] renewal of a registration
rationale: Unnamed checkbox widget at rect [346.3,434.2,358.2,447.7] — right checkbox of FIRST recital. Selected → enum value 'renewal'. Filler must bind by rect since the AcroForm field-id is empty (template anomaly: both FIRST checkboxes share the empty field-id).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The state or country under the laws of which it is organized is
rationale: Foreign LLP's home jurisdiction (state or country of organization).

label_verbatim: and the address of its principal office is located at: (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: First line of the principal-office address (single combined widget; street/city/state/zip not split).

label_verbatim: (street, city, state and zip code) [continuation line]
rationale: Second line of the principal-office address. Maps to the same canonical key as Text3; synth/fill must split the address string across the two widget lines.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date of its organization is
rationale: Date the LLP was organized in its home jurisdiction (not the date of Maine registration).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: A brief statement of the nature of the limited liability partnership's business:
rationale: Description of the LLP's business activities (free-form). Single-line widget.

label_verbatim: DATED ___
*By ___ (signature of a partner) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. (signature) line is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget.
